summary: Frontend-only validation of iter 215 UX fixes: (1) Goals tab removed from UnifiedClientOverview top-level tabs; (2) Inflation Rate, Expected Return, Volatility sliders replaced with number inputs in ScenarioEditor. All primary acceptance criteria PASS. One regression observation: AdviserGoals component is now orphaned (the standalone /adviser-goals route does not exist; the removed Goals tab was its only entry point). Minor cosmetic mismatch between HTML max attributes and clampInput() bounds.

issues: HTML min/max attribute mismatch with clampInput() bounds: input-return-base has HTML max=20 but clampInput clamps to 25; input-volatility-base has HTML max=40 but clampInput clamps to 50; input-inflation-base has HTML max=15. Functional clamping works correctly on keystroke, but browser-native validation (form submit, spinner buttons) will use the stricter HTML attrs. Consider aligning HTML max with clampInput bounds for consistency.

action_items: Confirm whether AdviserGoals component should remain accessible. Currently /adviser-goals route does not exist and the Goals tab in UnifiedClientOverview was its only entry point — AdviserGoals is now dead code/orphaned. Either add a route, expose it elsewhere, or remove the AdviserGoals component file.

(Cosmetic, optional) Align HTML min/max attributes on input-return-base (currently max=20), input-volatility-base (currently max=40), input-inflation-base (currently max=15) with the clampInput() bounds for UX consistency.
critical_code_review_comments: AdviserGoals lazy import + Target icon import + Goals TabsTrigger/TabsContent removed cleanly from UnifiedClientOverview.jsx — confirmed no orphaned imports remain in this file.
Slider import removed from RetirementWorkshop.jsx — confirmed (`role=slider` count = 0 on Investments+Assumptions sub-tabs).

Number inputs all wired through clampInput() with correct field-bound keys (expectedReturn, volatility, inflationRate) — onChange triggers re-projection through update() correctly. Verified: typing 3.2 into inflation persists.
AdviserGoals.jsx is now orphaned dead code if no route exists for it.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on primary acceptance criteria; 1 regression note re: orphaned AdviserGoals

test_credentials: No login. LocalStorage seeded: wealth_command_compliance_v5=permanent, app_mode=adviser, selected_client={id:thompson_family}.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 215 UX fixes verified end-to-end via Playwright. (1) UnifiedClientOverview shows 5 tabs only — overview/retirement/investments/budget/tax, NO client-tab-goals. (2) RetirementWorkshop ScenarioEditor: input-return-base, input-volatility-base, input-inflation-base all <input type=number> with clampInput, no Sliders. All 15 regression routes (/, /deals, /budget-exposure, /vault-documents, /webhooks-admin, /rbac-admin, /execution-rails, /adviser-hub, /adviser-compliance, /client-capture, /my-vault, /xplan-sync-hub, /advice-marketplace, /open-api-platform, /firm-branding) render. /retirement-confidence still loads. /adviser-goals returns 'No routes matched' — flagged as action item. Use button[aria-label='Close'] to dismiss compliance modal before tab interactions.
rca of the issue: N/A — feature validation, no bug found
